title: Whisper
description:
The Whisper graph is the internet's largest infrastructure graph — 7.39 billion nodes and 39 billion edges spanning DNS, BGP, WHOIS, GeoIP, web-link, email-infrastructure, and threat-intel data. This connector enriches OpenCTI observables (IPv4, IPv6, Domain-Name, Autonomous-System) with the relationship context Whisper has on them: resolving / linked / nameservering hostnames, announcing ASNs and prefixes, registrar and registered-organisation identities, country/city locations, threat-feed listings and threat scores, and LINKS_TO web-graph context.

Each enrichment ships a STIX bundle with the appropriate SCOs and SDOs (Location, Identity, Autonomous-System), `related-to` relationships that preserve the original Whisper edge semantics in the `description` field, and analyst-visible Notes summarising LINKS_TO direction caps, the seed's Whisper threat assessment, IP-side network context (announcing AS, announced prefix, BGP flags), and any DNS records Whisper returned that don't conform to RFC 1035.
short_description: Enrich IP, domain and AS observables with relationship context from the Whisper graph: DNS, BGP, WHOIS, threat-feed listings, and ASN/prefix infrastructure.
